text: AWS charges for EC2 instances are billed hourly. Data transfer out costs $0.09 per GB. S3 storage costs $0.023 per GB per month.
Stripe payment processing fees are 2.9% plus 30 cents per successful card charge. International cards add 1.5%. Monthly invoices are generated on the 1st of each month.
SaaS subscription renewals auto-renew 30 days before expiration. Annual plans are billed in full at renewal date. Cancellations must be submitted 7 days before renewal.
Adobe Creative Cloud subscription costs $54.99 per month or $599.88 per year. Billed on the same date each month. Auto-renews unless cancelled.
Google Cloud Platform charges are billed monthly. Compute Engine VMs are charged per second with a 1 minute minimum. Sustained use discounts apply automatically.
